title: Infosys Collaborates with Telenor Shared Services on Oracle Cloud HCM Implementation
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a collaboration with Telenor Shared Services to modernize TSS's HR operations through implementation of Oracle Cloud Human Capital Management. The engagement is intended to standardize HR processes, enhance employee productivity and experience, streamline HR operations, and unify Human Capital Management, Financial Management, Supply Chain Management, and Projects Portfolio Management on a single platform. No contract value, duration, or financial impact was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced its collaboration with Telenor Shared Services to implement Oracle Cloud Human Capital Management.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Telenor Shared Services to Modernize its HR Operations with a new Oracle Fusion Cloud Human Capital Management (HCM) Solution

key_facts.fact: The collaboration aims to standardize HR processes and enhance employee productivity and experience.
key_facts.section_heading: Aims to standardize HR processes, enhance employee productivity and experience

key_facts.fact: Infosys will help TSS streamline HR operations and unify its Human Capital Management, Financial Management, Supply Chain Management, and Projects Portfolio Management on a single platform.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Telenor Shared Services to Modernize its HR Operations with a new Oracle Fusion Cloud Human Capital Management (HCM) Solution

key_facts.fact: The end-to-end digital integration is expected to improve data quality and enable better decision-making through dashboards and advanced analytics.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Telenor Shared Services to Modernize its HR Operations with a new Oracle Fusion Cloud Human Capital Management (HCM) Solution

key_facts.fact: Infosys stated that the collaboration highlights its expertise in Oracle Cloud HCM implementations and digital transformation solutions for the telecom industry.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Telenor Shared Services to Modernize its HR Operations with a new Oracle Fusion Cloud Human Capital Management (HCM) Solution
